action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 12 training completed (10 epochs, unfrozen XLS-R-300M, augmentation). Dev EER dropped from 0.3254 to 0.0000, suspiciously perfect. Analysis: Likely overfitting to clean dev set; need test EER to assess generalization to unseen attacks/channels. Must verify predict.py works offline and submit eval to get test EER feedback (evaluator may still fail but worth attempting). Decision: Write quick test_pred.py to verify model loads and produces reasonable scores, then submit eval with best.pt checkpoint.
